## Pull Request

### Description

Brief description of changes made.

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor (code improvement with no functional change)
- [ ] 🧪 Test (adding or updating tests)

### Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have run `npm run type-check` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` with no errors
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally with `devvit playtest`
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings

### Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots of any UI changes or modmail formatting changes.

### Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
